description: Verify that Digital Office defaults to the smallest sufficient topology and escalates only for dependency, parallelism, or risk.

patterns: 多 Agent 不是默认模式

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; office=agent-system/bin/office-system; "$office" coordination-plan --task 'Draft one short internal note.' --agent writer > "$tmp/solo.json"; "$office" coordination-plan --task 'Research evidence, then draft the approved summary.' --agent researcher --agent writer --sequential > "$tmp/chain.json"; "$office" coordination-plan --task 'Compare independent sources in parallel.' --agent researcher --agent writer --parallelizable > "$tmp/parallel.json"; "$office" coordination-plan --task 'Publish a regulated legal conclusion to a customer.' --agent writer --risk high > "$tmp/human.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; solo,chain,parallel,human=[json.load(open(p)) for p in sys.argv[1:]]; assert solo["mode"]=="single_agent" and solo["max_parallel_agents"]==1; assert chain["mode"]=="sequential_specialist_chain"; assert parallel["mode"]=="parallel_expert_dag" and parallel["max_parallel_agents"]>=2; assert human["mode"]=="human_gated" and human["stop_required_before_execution"] is True' "$tmp/solo.json" "$tmp/chain.json" "$tmp/parallel.json" "$tmp/human.json"
